title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: coreutils bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for coreutils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The coreutils packages contain the GNU Core  and represent a combination of the previously used GNU fileutils, sh-utils, and textutils packages.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): du: leave_dir() killed by SIGABRT (JIRA:RHEL-124174)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
full_text:
An update for coreutils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The coreutils packages contain the GNU Core  and represent a combination of the previously used GNU fileutils, sh-utils, and textutils packages.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): du: leave_dir() killed by SIGABRT (JIRA:RHEL-124174)
